description: This Java class 'StubEmailProvider' provides a stub implementation of an email sender. It logs email details instead of actually sending emails, useful in development or continuous integration environments.

classes.name: StubEmailProvider
classes.description: A stub implementation of EmailProvider that logs email message details instead of sending real emails.

methods.name: StubEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the provider with notification properties.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Logs email sending details instead of dispatching an email.
